mapper.select: SELECT company_id, company_name, contact_phone, email, address, business_hours, service_cities, create_time, update_time FROM company WHERE company_id = #{companyId}
SELECT company_id, company_name, contact_phone, email, address, business_hours, service_cities, create_time, update_time FROM company ORDER BY company_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company (company_name, contact_phone, email, address, business_hours, service_cities) VALUES (#{companyName}, #{contactPhone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{businessHours}, #{serviceCities})
